overall.description: Third-person gameplay from a Japanese horror game featuring a schoolgirl in a sailor uniform exploring a dark, abandoned school building overtaken by red organic corruption. The character moves through locker rooms and classrooms while encountering supernatural elements, creating a tense, atmospheric experience.

scene_state.functional_zone: school locker room with metal storage lockers and wooden benches

events.description: character enters the locker room from a dark hallway

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously through the locker room while holding a metal pipe, examining the abandoned surroundings

entered.detail: tall dark metal storage lockers lining the left wall
wooden slatted bench in the middle of the room
wall-mounted board with papers and notices
red vine-like corruption covering the wall near entrance

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dimly lit school locker room with wooden floors and metal storage lockers. Red organic growth covers parts of the walls near the entrance. The room contains wooden benches and a bulletin board at the far end, with scattered papers on the floor suggesting abandonment.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned classroom with wooden desks and blackboard

events.description: exits locker room and enters the classroom through a sliding wooden door
mannequin figure vanishes from beside the blackboard as character approaches

agents.ego_description: approaching a strange mannequin standing near the teacher's desk and blackboard

notable_agents.action: mannequin standing motionless near blackboard before suddenly disappearing

entered.detail: rows of wooden student desks with papers scattered on top
large dark chalkboard with chalk drawings and wall clock above
traditional Japanese grid-patterned windows showing dark outside
wooden desk at front of classroom near blackboard

segments.scene_description: The character enters an abandoned classroom with rows of wooden desks and a large blackboard at the front. Grid-patterned windows show a dark exterior. A creepy mannequin stands near the teacher's desk but vanishes mysteriously as the character approaches. Papers are scattered across the desks and red growth is visible near the windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: corrupted school hallway covered in red organic tendrils

events.description: exits classroom into hallway heavily infested with red organic growth
character transitions from walking to running through the corridor

agents.ego_description: running through the corrupted hallway, weapon raised, navigating past the red growth

entered.detail: walls completely covered in pulsating red organic tendrils
metal lockers along the right wall partially covered in growth
doorway at end of hall leading to stairs

segments.scene_description: Exiting the classroom, the character enters a narrow hallway where red organic corruption covers every surface. The walls pulse with tendrils of growth and the floor is obscured by the biological mass. The character breaks into a run, moving past partially covered lockers toward a doorway at the far end.

scene_state.functional_zone: stairwell with red growth covering steps and walls

events.description: enters stairwell from the corrupted hallway

agents.ego_description: climbing the stairs while observing the red growth covering the stairwell walls and steps

entered.detail: staircase with steps covered in red organic matter
wooden handrail along the right side of stairs
bright window at the top of the stairwell providing only natural light

segments.scene_description: The character enters a concrete stairwell where the red corruption continues to cover the steps and walls. A wooden handrail lines the right side, and a bright window at the top of the landing provides the only natural light in the otherwise dark space. The character ascends the stairs cautiously.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a decaying school that descends from eerie abandonment into an all-consuming biological nightmare. It begins as the character enters a dimly lit locker room with wooden floors and scattered papers, where red organic growth first appears clinging to the walls. As the camera moves into an adjacent classroom, the atmosphere grows more surreal with a vanishing mannequin standing among rows of desks before the scene shifts abruptly into a narrow hallway. The environment then transforms into a pulsing corridor of red corruption that completely obscures the walls and floor, forcing the character into a run toward a distant exit. Finally, the camera follows the character into a concrete stairwell where the biological mass continues to climb the steps, leading upward toward a single source of bright light at the top of the landing.
